hero.title: Turning Dreams into Reality
hero.subtitle: DreamSpace Realties is a distinguished real estate firm that makes property buying and selling simple, reliable, and hassle-free. We deal in residential plots, flats, and houses, ensuring that buyers get access to genuine and verified options. Our focus is on maintaining transparency, offering prime locations, and guiding clients at every step—from site visits to final documentation—so they can make confident decisions and secure their dream property.

hero.title: Premium Plots in Strategic Locations
hero.subtitle: Invest in high-growth residential plotted developments in Bangalore's most sought-after corridors. With wide internal roads, underground utilities, fully loaded amenities, and immediate construction readiness, DreamSpace helps you secure your family's future.

about.title: About DreamSpace Realties
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Property Partner
about.description:
DreamSpace Realties is a trusted name in the real estate space, focused on making property deals smooth and transparent.

We help clients buy and sell residential plots, flats, and houses with complete confidence. Our team ensures every property is verified and offers genuine value to buyers.

We guide you through every step, from selecting the right property to final documentation. With a focus on prime locations and customer satisfaction, we aim to simplify your journey. At DreamSpace Realties, our mission is to turn your property goals into reality with trust and ease.

projects.name: MEGA PROJECT
projects.description: Mega Project offers premium villa plots designed for fine living. Situated in Bangalore's fastest-growing residential hub, it features wide black-topped roads, underground electricity and drainage, a fully equipped clubhouse, and round-the-clock security. This layout combines peaceful green living with urban convenience, making it the perfect choice for your dream home or a high-return investment.
projects.shortDescription: Premium villa plots with state-of-the-art amenities on Outer Ring Road.
projects.address: Outer Ring Road Extension, Near Tech Park, Bangalore North
highlights: Gated community with 30ft & 40ft wide internal tar roads
Underground cabling for electricity, internet, and telephone lines
Sewage treatment plant (STP) & rainwater harvesting conduits
Overhead water tank with connections to every plot
amenities: Grand Entrance Arch with Security Cabin
locationAdvantages: 10 Mins from Major IT Parks & Tech Hubs
5 Mins drive from Proposed Metro Station
Top-rated international schools within a 3km radius
Direct access to Outer Ring Road & NH44

faqs.question: Is the project RERA approved?
faqs.answer: Yes, the project is registered with Karnataka RERA. The registration number is PRM/KA/RERA/1251/446/PR/220524/005912.

faqs.question: Can I get a bank loan for purchasing a plot?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! The project is approved by major banks like SBI, HDFC, ICICI, and LIC HFL. Loans up to 70-80% are easily available depending on eligibility.

faqs.question: What is the status of utility connections?
faqs.answer: All utilities (electricity cables, water lines, sewage connections, fiber internet) are laid underground directly to the boundary of each plot.

projects.seoTitle: Premium Villa Plots for Sale on Outer Ring Road Bangalore | Mega Project
projects.seoDescription: Buy premium villa plots in Mega Project on Outer Ring Road Bangalore. Ready to construct gated community with 20+ amenities and bank approval.

projects.name: PANCHWATI NAGAR
projects.description: Panchwati Nagar is a nature-centric plotted township near Devanahalli. Nestled in a peaceful green valley, it is designed for those who appreciate organic living and clean air. The layout features beautiful organic gardens, fruit-bearing tree pathways, jogging trails, and a natural lake view park, while providing high-quality infrastructure like wide concrete roads, electricity, and continuous water supply.
projects.shortDescription: Nature-themed luxury villa plots located near Devanahalli Airport.
projects.address: Panchwati Nagar, Devanahalli Airport Road, Bangalore Rural
highlights: Surrounded by reserve forests with 100% pollution-free air
Over 500 fruit-bearing trees planted along avenues
High-quality concrete roads with rainwater gutters
24-hour security with boundary walls all around
Independently metered borewell water supply for all plots
locationAdvantages: 15 Mins drive from Bangalore International Airport
Close proximity to Aerospace SEZ & Hardware Park

faqs.question: When is possession available?
faqs.answer: The layout is fully ready and plots are registered immediately upon purchase. You can start constructing your villa right away.

faqs.question: What is the maintenance structure?
faqs.answer: Maintenance is managed by DreamSpace Care for the first 2 years, after which it will be handed over to the plot owners' welfare association.

projects.seoTitle: Plots in Devanahalli | Panchwati Nagar Gated Community Bangalore Rural
projects.seoDescription: Explore nature-themed residential plots for sale at Panchwati Nagar, Devanahalli. Buy villa plots near Bangalore Airport with world-class facilities.

projects.name: HARI OM NAGAR
projects.description: Hari Om Nagar offers premium boutique plots off Sarjapur Road. Perfect for individuals seeking immediate construction, this gated layout features an intimate community of limited plots with an active luxury clubhouse, underground cabling, wide asphalted paths, and beautiful theme gardens.
projects.shortDescription: Premium villa plots near schools and shopping centers on Sarjapur Road.
projects.address: Off Sarjapur Main Road, Near Prestige Smart City, Bangalore East
highlights: Highly sought-after locality with rapid price appreciation
Fully underground high-speed fiber internet and electrical infrastructure
Avenue lighting and beautiful decorative gateway arch
Close connection to Wipro Corporate Office
Individual water taps and electricity meters provided to all plots
locationAdvantages: 8 Mins from Wipro Corporate Office, Sarjapur Road
10 Mins from Decathlon Sarjapur & Shopping Hubs
Top tier schools (Greenwood High, TISB) within 10-15 mins
Excellent connectivity to Outer Ring Road, Bellandur, and HSR Layout

faqs.question: Is there any commercial zone inside the layout?
faqs.answer: No, Hari Om Nagar is purely a residential gated community. A small convenience store facility is provided in the clubhouse building for daily essentials.

faqs.question: Are there any pending approvals?
faqs.answer: No, the project has received 100% approval from BMRDA/local authorities and RERA. All titles are verified.

projects.seoTitle: Plots for Sale in Sarjapur Road Bangalore | Hari Om Nagar Gated Community
projects.seoDescription: Premium villa plots for sale off Sarjapur Road Bangalore in Hari Om Nagar. Gate community with swimming pool, gym, wide roads, and ready for registry.

testimonials.name: Rohan Sharma
testimonials.feedback: Bought a plot in Mega Project through DreamSpace. The documentation process was extremely smooth, and their representative was there with me at the registrar's office. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Anjali Deshmukh
testimonials.feedback: DreamSpace Realties was helpful in explaining the RERA details and checking the land titles. I bought a plot in Panchwati Nagar and am looking forward to building my house next year.

contact.address: 123 DreamSpace Tower, Outer Ring Road, Bangalore, Karnataka - 560103
contact.workingHours: Mon - Sat: 9:00 AM - 7:00 PM, Sunday: Closed
